name: Spicy Beef Satay
recipeInstructions:
1. Place steak in freezer for 30 minutes to firm, then slice into 1/4 inch thick strips.
2. In a shallow glass dish, combine soy sauce, sherry, sesame oil, onion, garlic, sugar, ginger, and 1/2 tsp of the red pepper flakes. Add beef strips; turn to coat with marinade. Cover and refrigerate for 2 to 4 hours.
3. Soak twenty-four 8-inch bamboo skewers in water for 20 minutes. Drain the beef; reserve 2 tbsp of the marinade.
4. Thread beef strips, accordion-style, on skewers.
5. Meanwhile, in a small saucepan, combine the reserved marinade, remaining 1/2 tsp red pepper flakes, peanut butter, and water. Heat over low heat for 8 to 10 minutes or until the sauce is thick and warm (add more water if necessary).
6. Grill kabobs on an uncovered grill over medium-hot briquets for 2 minutes. Turn and cook for 2 more minutes.
7. Serve beef strips with sauce. Assembled kabobs may be refrigerated, covered, 1 to 2 hours before grilling.
